profile.name: Nisarg
profile.description: Crafting digital experiences that push the boundaries of web technology. Building the future, one line of code at a time.

featuredProjects.title: Navicore
featuredProjects.description: Multimodal GPS style navigation system for Mumbai's transport network

featuredProjects.title: E-Commerce Platform
featuredProjects.description: Scalable e-commerce solution with headless CMS, payment processing, inventory management, and real-time order tracking. Features Stripe integration and webhooks.

featuredProjects.title: Real-Time Chat App
featuredProjects.description: End-to-end encrypted messaging platform with video calls, file sharing, and group chats. Built with WebSockets and WebRTC for seamless real-time communication.

allProjects.title: Portfolio CMS
allProjects.description: A content management system specifically designed for developer portfolios. Features drag-and-drop editing, markdown support, and automatic SEO optimization.

allProjects.title: Weather App
allProjects.description: Beautiful weather application with animated backgrounds, 7-day forecasts, and location-based services. Includes air quality index and UV tracking.

allProjects.title: Task Manager
allProjects.description: Kanban-style task management tool with team collaboration, time tracking, and automated workflows. Integrates with popular tools like Slack and GitHub.

allProjects.title: Fitness Tracker
allProjects.description: Comprehensive fitness tracking application with workout plans, nutrition logging, progress analytics, and social features for workout buddies.

allProjects.title: Music Visualizer
allProjects.description: Audio reactive visual experience using Web Audio API and Three.js. Creates stunning 3D visualizations that respond to music in real-time.

allProjects.title: Recipe Finder
allProjects.description: AI-powered recipe discovery app with ingredient recognition, meal planning, and shopping list generation. Uses image recognition for ingredient scanning.

blogs.title: Building Scalable APIs
blogs.description: A deep dive into designing and implementing APIs that can handle millions of requests. Covers rate limiting, caching strategies, and database optimization.

blogs.title: React Server Components
blogs.description: Understanding the new paradigm of React Server Components and how they change the way we build web applications. Includes practical examples and migration tips.

blogs.title: CSS Container Queries
blogs.description: The future of responsive design is here. Learn how container queries enable component-level responsiveness and why they matter for design systems.

blogs.title: TypeScript Best Practices
blogs.description: Level up your TypeScript skills with advanced patterns, utility types, and real-world examples from production codebases.

blogs.title: Web Performance Deep Dive
blogs.description: From Core Web Vitals to advanced optimization techniques. Everything you need to know about making your web apps blazing fast.

connect.title: GitHub
connect.description: Check out my open source projects, contributions, and code repositories. I actively contribute to the developer community.

connect.title: LinkedIn
connect.description: Connect with me professionally. Let's discuss opportunities, collaborations, or just have a chat about technology.

connect.title: Twitter / X
connect.description: Follow me for tech insights, development tips, and occasional hot takes on the latest in web development.

connect.title: Email
connect.description: Want to work together or have a question? Drop me an email and I'll get back to you as soon as possible.

connect.title: YouTube
connect.description: Watch tutorials, project walkthroughs, and coding sessions. Learning in public and sharing knowledge.
